raw_responses.title: PARSE: Schema Optimization for Entity Extraction (2025/10)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: notes that static JSON schemas as contracts yield suboptimal extraction when ambiguous/incomplete; calls for schema-tolerance adjustment.

raw_responses.title: Generating Structured Outputs: Benchmark + Studies (2025/1)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: explicit framework-strictness analysis — over-constrained reject valid outputs; under-constrained cannot guarantee validity.

raw_responses.title: CRANE: Constrained LLM Generation (2025/2)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: tools impose syntactic/semantic constraints; LLM outputs do not always comply with downstream tool requirements.

raw_responses.title: Schema Reinforcement Learning (2025/2)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: fine-grained schema validator + RL to enforce JSON validity.

raw_responses.title: Non-Invasive Constrained Generation (2024/3 / 2026/1)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: minimally invasive constrained decoding; token misalignment → downstream accuracy drop.
